mapper.select: select * from ai_chat_session where user_id = #{userId} and is_system_session = 1 and status = 1 and is_recycle = 0 and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from ai_chat_session where user_id = #{userId} and session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 1 and is_recycle = 0 and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND is_recycle = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 1 AND is_recycle = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
select * from ai_chat_session where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and is_recycle = 0 and is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_session SET status = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_recycle = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ai_chat_session SET last_message_content = #{lastMessageContent}, update_time = NOW() -- 新增：同步更新更新时间字段（仅此处更新） WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_recycle = 0 AND is_deleted = 0; -- 新增：排除系统逻辑删除的记录
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_chat_session (session_id, session_uuid, user_id, chat_title, status, is_system_session, is_deleted, is_recycle, role_id, last_message_content) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{sessionUuid}, #{userId}, #{chatTitle}, #{status}, IFNULL(#{isSystemSession}, 0), 0, 0, IFNULL(#{roleId}, 1), #{lastMessageContent} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_session SET is_recycle = 1 - is_recycle -- 核心：0→1 / 1→0 切换回收站状态 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} -- userId是Integer，数据库BIGINT可兼容Integer AND is_recycle = #{currentIsRecycle} -- 匹配新枚举的数值 AND is_deleted = 0; -- 新增：不操作系统逻辑删除的记录
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat_session WHERE session_uuid = #{sessionUuid} AND is_recycle = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} -- 保持Integer类型适配 AND is_recycle = #{isRecycle} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
